title: Lassie's Great Adventure
writer: Maria Little, Sumner Arthur Long, Monroe Manning
actors: June Lockhart, Hugh Reilly, Jon Provost
plot: While in Canada Timmy and Lassie encounter a downed hot air ballonist. By accident they end up in the balloon which takes them into the wilderness. The young boy and his dog must find a way to survive even fending off a wild pig.
